name: Rolled Oats Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 cake of compressed yeast, dissolved in 2 cups lukewarm water
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the boiling water and sweetened condensed milk. Stir until blended.
2. Pour over the rolled oats. Allow to stand for 1 hour.
3. Add the cooking oil, corn syrup, salt, flour, and yeast (softened in lukewarm water) to the mixture. Beat thoroughly.
4. Let it rise until doubled in size, then beat again.
5. Pour into a well-oiled pan. Cover and let rise until doubled in size.
6. Bake in a moderate oven (375°F) for about 45 minutes.
